---
title: "Study progress"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


## Wave 3 Progress

* Families who have completed both questionnaires: **94**

* Families who have sent us all videos: **89**

The prize draw winner for March/April has been notified.

The next draw will be on **31st July.**

We have started interviewing caregivers about their experiences as an extra optional part of our Wave 3 data collection. 

* Interviews so far:  **19**
